source_prompt: Create an image of this exact character in this style.

intermediate.label: Stylized base
intermediate.default_prompt: Create an image of this exact character in this style.

slots.label: Turnaround
slots.default_prompt: Create a full body turnaround sheet of this exact character: four full-body poses on a pure white background — front view, left profile, back view, right profile — evenly spaced in a clean horizontal row, consistent lighting and style, no background noise, no shadows, same proportions and detailing across all views.

slots.label: T-pose
slots.default_prompt: Full body T-pose of this exact character on a pure white background, arms straight out horizontally, legs together, neutral expression, even soft studio light, no shadows, no background detail, consistent style.

slots.label: Side three-quarter
slots.default_prompt: Three-quarter side view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, even soft studio light, consistent style, no shadows.

slots.label: Back three-quarter
slots.default_prompt: Three-quarter back view of this exact character, full body, standing relaxed, on a pure white background, even soft studio light, consistent style, no shadows.

slots.label: Extreme close-up
slots.default_prompt: Extreme close-up of this exact character's face, eyes and upper nose filling the frame, sharp detail, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Close-up
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character, head and shoulders, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Mid
slots.default_prompt: Mid-shot of this exact character from the waist up, standing relaxed, soft natural light, neutral expression, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Neutral
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character with a calm neutral expression, mouth closed, eyes forward, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Smiling
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character with a warm relaxed smile, lips closed or barely parted, eyes lit, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Laughing
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character laughing genuinely, mouth open, eyes crinkled, soft even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Angry
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character looking angry, brow furrowed, jaw set, hard side light from the left, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Surprised
slots.default_prompt: Close-up portrait of this exact character looking surprised, eyes wide, mouth slightly open, bright even light, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Walking
slots.default_prompt: Full body shot of this exact character walking forward in mid-stride, natural gait, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style, no shadows on the floor.

slots.label: Running
slots.default_prompt: Full body shot of this exact character running, mid-stride, arms in motion, slight forward lean, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Sitting
slots.default_prompt: Full body shot of this exact character sitting on a simple wooden stool, relaxed posture, hands resting, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.

slots.label: Leaning
slots.default_prompt: Full body shot of this exact character leaning against an unseen wall, weight on one leg, arms relaxed, soft daylight, plain neutral background, consistent style.
